ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season the game was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game occurred */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the game was home or away */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game (e.g., '110-105') */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each quarter (e.g., '25-20, 28-30, 30-25, 27-28') */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Names of the referees officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the stats are associated with */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stats are for */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player during the game */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls committed by the player */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the player for the game */,
  "blocks_against" INTEGER /* Number of blocks the player received */,
  "steals_against" INTEGER /* Number of steals the player had against them */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Guard, Forward, Center) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., '6-8') */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_pick_number" INTEGER /* Draft pick number of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience the player has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "regular_season_games" INTEGER /* Total number of regular season games played */,
  "playoff_games" INTEGER /* Total number of playoff games played */,
  "championship" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team won the championship in that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team in that season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team in that season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team in that season */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game by the team */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game by the team */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game by the team */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the team for the season */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the team for the season */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the team for the season */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game by the team */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game by the team */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
